issue.title: [Feature]: Add GraphQL rocket scan with Blueprint gate
issue.body:
## Work Type

Feature

## Problem / Goal

### Concern 1

Replace an O(N) REST scan with GraphQL pagination.

### Concern 2

Require Blueprint readiness before an issue enters agent work.

## Context

This issue combines two changes in one script and one SOP section.

## Expected Outcome

The scan returns only issues that have a trusted rocket and Blueprint approval.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The scan filters for `blueprint-ready`.

## Reproduction Steps / Task Plan

1. Implement the scan.
2. Run the smoke test.

## Priority

P2

## Requester / Owner

@frankyxhl
